title: RAPID RESOURCE & TREATMENT ACCESS HOTLINE - 211info
text: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK OF LANE COUNTY RAPID RESOURCE & TREATMENT ACCESS HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a single point of access to substance use treatment, harm reduction, and recovery resources. Services are offered by a collaborative group of local providers. Partner agencies may also be able to help with additional services such as housing support, job finding assistance, peer support, mental health support, needle exchange, and STI testing. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 422-2595 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (800) 422-2595 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Hotlines Substance Use Disorder Referrals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
